name: Tomb Offering
short_description: A thief broke into an ancient Chinese tomb, harboring ill intentions to plunder its treasures. The tomb was filled with countless riches of gold and silver. You trespassed into this grand tomb, driven by greed for wealth. Remember: "As you act, God is always watching you."
detailed_description:
Tomb raiding is a deceitful act.

In ancient times, there was a tradition of lavish burials, treating the dead as if they were still alive.
Tombs are filled with countless treasures of gold and silver.
You play as a thief who sneaked into these grand tombs, driven by greed for wealth.

Tomb Offering is a horror game centered around tomb raiding. You play as a grave robber who ventures into ancient tombs to plunder their treasures.

Collect treasures, sell them, and amass great wealth.
But as you steal more and more, the aura inside the tomb grows increasingly strange...

Gameplay Features:

  • Explore the Tomb: Raid treasures and trigger random events, bringing home the gold and silver you find.

  • Unlock Endings: Discover multiple endings and hidden storylines based on your choices.

With realistic graphics, immerse yourself in the eerie atmosphere of this ancient Chinese tomb.

supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
